category_sources: source_facts.description says mailing-list style code reviews for GitHub; official docs say prr brings mailing-list style code reviews to GitHub PRs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is prr; official documentation and repository title use prr.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says full documentation is at https://doc.dxuuu.xyz/prr/; opened docs page identifies itself as prr documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/danobi/prr, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official docs describe downloading PRs into review files, marking them up in an editor, and submitting reviews.
